input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.2.6
            TITLE: the presentation may be given in different settings, such as a conference room, a group

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.2.6: The presentation may be given in different settings, such as a conference room, a group
S.2.2.6 The presentation may be given in different settings, such as a conference room, a group 
meeting, virtually, or in conjunction with other Static Events.   
Specific details will be included in the Presentation Concept or communicated separately.

final_answer: rule S.2.2.6: The presentation may be given in different settings, such as a conference room, a group meeting, virtually, or in conjunction with other Static Events. Specific details will be included in the Presentation Concept or communicated separately.
